title: ortholoma incarnatum
intro: Ortholoma incarnatum, also known as Desert Marigold or Fiddleneck, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern regions of North America. The plant is known for its bright yellow and orange flowers, which bloom from February to May, and its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ortholoma incarnatum include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedy.
